organization.organization_background: Utkrusht is a proof-of-skills marketplace that helps agile teams find talent with strong fundamental concepts with within days. We help aspiring professionals improve their profile with continuous improvement in their skills, documenting their journey and helping them fulfill their potential. We primarily build, conduct, proctor and disseminate proof-of-skill assessments in Technical domains like AI, ML, Fullstack development, High scale distributed systems, DevOps etc but do help non-tech roles like Sales, HR, Marketing etc

role_context: At the INTERMEDIATE level, you will own the design and implementation of medium-complexity microservices, applying SRP, bounded context, and domain-driven concepts with limited supervision and an eye toward independence. You will design and expose RESTful, gRPC, and GraphQL APIs (with versioning and documentation) and implement both synchronous and asynchronous messaging, while ensuring clear service boundaries, appropriate data management patterns, and resilience measures. You are expected to work with mainstream frameworks (Java/Spring Boot, .NET Core, Node.js, Python/Flask/FastAPI), implement CI/CD pipelines, containerization, basic service discovery and configuration, and monitor health and performance with standard tooling; you also write unit/integration/contract tests and participate in code reviews. You should demonstrate solid collaboration skills, produce maintainable documentation, and show awareness of advanced topics (e.g., event-driven patterns, basic microservices security, and deployment strategies) while delivering reliable, scalable services with moderate autonomy.
questions_prompt:
Please ensure the questions you ask cover
- **Architecture & Decomposition**: demonstrated ability to design microservices with single responsibility, bounded contexts, DDD concepts, and appropriate service boundaries; show how to decompose complex domains into cohesive services and manage data ownership (database-per-service, eventual consistency) including awareness of event-driven patterns when applicable.
- **APIs, Data Formats & Documentation**: design RESTful, gRPC, and GraphQL APIs with versioning and comprehensive documentation (Swagger/OpenAPI); apply appropriate contract testing approaches and demonstrate API design skills, including data serialization formats (JSON, Protobuf, Avro) and schema evolution considerations.
- **Deployment, Operations & Resilience**: implement and operate microservices with Docker and Kubernetes basics, service discovery, config management, CI/CD pipelines, and resilience patterns (circuit breakers, retries, bulkheads); show monitoring/observability (Prometheus/Grafana, ELK/EFK, distributed tracing) and health checks.
- **Security, Testing & Quality Assurance**: secure services with OAuth2/JWT and API gateways; perform unit, integration, and contract testing (Pact, Spring Cloud Contract), use mocking tools (WireMock, MockServer), and participate in design/code reviews with an emphasis on maintainable, testable APIs and services.

The goal is to evaluate...
